strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong architectural mindset with demonstrated interest in clean code, testing, and developer tooling
concerns: Title inflation in resume (e.g., Staff/Senior roles early in career) raises questions about actual seniority level
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to renewable energy/construction tech context
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with a strong track record of independent delivery, but his resume overstates seniority and lacks clear alignment with the renewable energy sector, while his limited German may hinder on-site collaboration.
